title: Pixels to Pages - The Story of Electronic Gaming Monthly
original_title: Pixels to Pages - The Story of Electronic Gaming Monthly
overview: Electronic Gaming Monthly (EGM) was a videogame magazine that started in 1989 and lasted (sporadically) until summer of 2014. This feature documentary involves many people from its heyday, from starting up to its eventual selling to Ziff Davis and how that affected the tone of the magazine.
